title: Serving Tongs,Buffet Tongs, ACAUTO Stainless Steel Food Tong Serving Tong Small Serving Tongs Stainless Steel Mini Appetizer Tongs (18 CM(6 Pack))
features: Durable Material, Easy on Your Hand: ACAUTO small serving tongs are made from a thick, corrosion resistant stainless steel for unbeatable strength and premium construction, while remaining lightweight and easy to handle!
Food Grade Stainless Steel: ACAUTO tongs are manufactured from a premium food grade stainless steel. Serving for tea party, coffee, breakfast, home party, wedding or daily kitchen tasks.

Multi-usages: Great for serving appetizers, meat, steak, bread, salad, hot dog, spaghetti, sugar cube, ice cube, lemon slice, jelly, cookie, marshmallows, shredded cheese, grated carrots, crescent rolls, hash browns, bacon, jam, soft cheese or pickle slices, etc.

Package Content: Serving tongs (Brushed) The length of the handle and the width of the opening are ergonomically designed, ensuring tight grip and control. These serving tongs are highly heat resistant.
Dishwasher Safe: Made of food grade stainless steel, these tongs are easy to wash and dishwasher safe.
